name: Dimensional Image: Leigh
descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Leigh gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Whenever she loses HP, she gains [Arg2] {STR}, up to [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per battle. After stacking [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times}, the Base Arithmetica Cost of {Pain and Pleasure} -2, and the DMG count +1.
